title: clematis × jouiniana
intro: Clematis × jouiniana, also known as the Jouin clematis or Clematis montana, is a hybrid flowering plant in the buttercup family, native to China. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, derived from its roots and leaves. The plant is said to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating skin conditions due to its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties. In herbal preparations, Clematis × jouiniana is often used in teas, infusions, and decoctions to leverage its medicinal properties, although its usage and efficacy may vary depending on the region and cultural practices.
